# Code Examples

## JavaScript

```javascript
function hello() {
  console.log("Hello, world!");
}
```

## Python

```python
def hello():
    print("Hello, world!")
```

## TypeScript

```typescript
const greet = (name: string): string => {
  return `Hello, ${name}!`;
}
```

## Go

```go
func main() {
    fmt.Println("Hello, world!")
}
```

## Plain

```
Just plain text in a code block
```

## Shell

```bash
echo "Hello from shell"
```
